ClientID.title: Client ID
ClientID.description: Blackbaud SKY API OAuth Client ID.

ClientSecret.title: Client Secret
ClientSecret.description: Blackbaud SKY API OAuth Client Secret.

SubscriptionKey.title: Subscription Key
SubscriptionKey.description: Blackbaud SKY API subscription key (Bb-Api-Subscription-Key header).

AccessToken.title: Access Token
AccessToken.description: Current OAuth access token. Connector refreshes automatically when expired.

RefreshToken.title: Refresh Token
RefreshToken.description: OAuth refresh token, used to mint new access tokens.
